name: auto-consul-functions
description: Firebase Functions Gen 2 (TS) - webhooks, storage triggers, schedules, and dev-only upstream mocks (RDW, Autotelex).

scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-auto-consul "vitest run --config vitest.rules.config.ts"
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
